sources_checked.limitation: Confirms identity/address and provides general drink-menu description (margaritas, 18 beers on tap, cocktails), but no itemized food/drink menu or allergen disclosures on the page itself; links to menu PDFs.

Linked from the current official page as the latest menu PDF, but returned no machine-readable text via web_fetch ("This PDF is empty or contains no machine-readable text") - likely an image-based/scanned PDF. Not usable as menu evidence without OCR, which was out of scope for the time box.

Machine-readable text extracted successfully. Filename indicates Nov 2021 version, older than the current (non-extractable) PDF linked from the live page, so dish list/prices may be somewhat dated. No allergen statements present in the text.

manual_review_reason: Menu source used is an older (Nov 2021) official PDF because the current official PDF linked from the live restaurant page is image-based and not machine-readable; food/drink specifics (esp. weekly specials, exact beverage list) may have changed. Dish descriptions are generally terse ('Chef's Special - see specials board', 'Vegetable Special - see specials board') with no ingredient detail for several items.
